name: @game-omni/verify
description: W5 verify harness — the general interpreter that boots a built Phaser game headless, compiles each gdd milestone assertion (setup->input->observe->expect) into Playwright actions, evaluates the observe grammar off window.__GAME__, and emits the VALIDATION_PASSED/FAILED marker. Conforms to packages/skills/verify/assertion-execution-grammar.md §5.
